summary: Comprehensive testing of ALPHA DROP - TikTok Shop Product Intelligence Engine with new features completed. All 4 key features implemented and working: 1) Alpha Score thresholds adjusted (72+ for EXPLOSIVE), 2) Stripe billing with 3 tiers, 3) Watchlist functionality, 4) Updated navigation. Dashboard shows 83+ explosive products as required.

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: 30s timeout when calling real TikTok Shop API
flaky_endpoints.workaround: Expected behavior for real API calls - not a bug

passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint (200 OK)
Get products endpoint with 50 products returned
Dashboard products endpoint with 3 sections
Dashboard stats endpoint showing 83 explosive products
Product detail endpoint with full analytics
Alerts endpoint with 10 alerts
Categories endpoint with 12 categories
Product filtering by status and updated score threshold (72+)
Refresh products endpoint
Alpha Score thresholds updated (72+ for EXPLOSIVE)
Subscription plans endpoint with Scout $29, Hunter $79, Predator $199
Watchlist get/add/remove functionality working
Stripe checkout creation working
Cron endpoint security (rejects without API key)
Dashboard loads with updated stats (83 explosive products)
Navigation includes Watchlist and Pricing links
Product cards show bookmark icon functionality
Pricing page displays 3 subscription tiers with correct prices
Watchlist page loads and navigation works
Product status badges display correctly (EXPLOSIVE, RISING, EARLY_SIGNAL)
Alpha Scores display correctly on product cards
Mobile responsive design with mobile menu
Mobile navigation includes all required links
Product hover interactions working

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (All key features working including navigation, pricing, watchlist)
